sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13718" key="a)posknifo/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποσκνῑφόω</orth>, <sense id="n13718.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">obscure, darken,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:42:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">42.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
